title: SRS airbag system structure description - Side airbag and side curtain airbag
section: Driver assistance SRS airbags seat belts

blocks.text: SRS airbag system structure description - Side airbag and side curtain airbag

The side airbags are located on the outside of the driver and front passenger seatbacks. By mounting the airbags on the seat backs, they are not affected by the seat slide or recline position and can always be operated under optimal conditions for the occupants. The side airbag assembly contains the inflator and bag inside the airbag case. When deployed, the airbag is deployed by breaking the seam between the lid of the airbag case and the seat bag, thus ensuring efficient deployment. The side airbags may not operate properly if objects are attached near the deployment area or if seat covers other than those specifically designed for the side airbags are attached.

The side curtain airbags are compactly stored in the roof side section, and gas is supplied to the airbags from an inflator located near the top of the rear door through the roof side section to deploy them. The side curtain airbags may not function properly if any objects are attached near the deployment area or if any parts other than those exclusively for the side curtain airbags are attached.
